title: mRemoteNG doesn't start if keyfile not available
author: klukaszczyk
body_snippet:
<!--
Only file GitHub issues for bugs and feature requests.  All other topics will be closed.

Before opening an issue, please search for a duplicate or closed issue.
Please provide as much detail as possible for us to fix your issue.
-->

If private keyfile is used for SSH authentication, and it's not available mRemoteNG doesn't start. It display error "Could not load startup file".
Expected action is to ignore error and switch to default authentication using login and password like in ...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Fix candidate packaged in PR #3114: PR #3114 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG` 
This hardens startup loading so PuTTY provider failures are logged and do not abort loading the connections file. 
Validation run on fork (x86/x64/ARM64 + tests/specs): CI run 21787754981 on `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
